description: Payment processing, subscription billing, and invoicing APIs for monetizing applications.

entries.name: Stripe
entries.summary: The most widely integrated payments platform: checkout, subscriptions, invoicing, and a powerful API.
entries.freeTier: No monthly fee; pay only per successful transaction (no free transaction quota).

entries.name: Paddle
entries.summary: Merchant-of-record billing platform handling global tax/VAT compliance for SaaS subscriptions.
entries.freeTier: No monthly fee; pay per transaction only.

entries.name: Lemon Squeezy
entries.summary: Merchant-of-record platform for selling software/digital products with built-in tax handling, popular with indie devs.
entries.freeTier: No monthly fee; pay per transaction only.

entries.name: PayPal Developer
entries.summary: Widely recognized payment buttons and checkout API with strong consumer trust/brand recognition.
entries.freeTier: No monthly fee; pay only per transaction.
entries.paidFrom: Standard rate ~3.49% + fixed fee per transaction (varies by region).

entries.name: Razorpay
entries.summary: Payments and business banking platform focused on the Indian market, supports UPI, cards, and netbanking.
entries.freeTier: No setup/monthly fee; pay only per transaction.

entries.name: Wise Platform
entries.summary: Cross-border payments API for sending international transfers at near-real exchange rates.
entries.freeTier: No subscription fee; pay variable rates per international transfer.

entries.name: Chargebee
entries.summary: Subscription billing and revenue management platform handling complex pricing models and dunning.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for businesses with under $250k in annual recurring billing.
entries.paidFrom: Performance plan billed on revenue beyond free threshold.

entries.name: Commerce Layer
entries.summary: Composable commerce API for building, placing, and managing orders from any frontend.
entries.freeTier: Developer plan free: 100 orders/month, up to 1,000 SKUs.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans scale with order volume.
